Retirement Services

Retirement Services

A written plan for every dollar of your retirement.

Tax-efficient withdrawal sequencing, Social Security timing, portfolio design, and estate planning — built to work as one integrated strategy.

See our approach

Core Services

Retirement Money MapA clear plan for every dollar in retirement Tax-Efficient StrategiesMinimize taxes with smart withdrawal sequencing Portfolio ManagementDiversified portfolios aligned with your timeline Social Security OptimizationTime your benefits to maximize lifetime income Estate & Legacy PlanningProtect your family and pass wealth efficiently

Specialty

Federal Benefits

Federal Employee Benefits

FERS done right. By people who actually know the system.

Pension timing, TSP strategy, FEHB vs. Medicare, survivor elections, and the mistakes that cost federal employees hundreds of thousands in retirement.

Explore federal hub

Plan Your Benefits

FERS RetirementPension timing and computation FERS SupplementBridge income before Social Security TSP PlanningOptimize your Thrift Savings Plan FEHB in RetirementFEHB vs. Medicare at 65 FEGLI AnalysisLife insurance choices for federal retirees

SDBA

Self-Directed Brokerage Accounts

Take control of the money in your 401(k).

If your employer plan offers an SDBA window, you can move beyond the default fund menu into a professionally managed portfolio — without leaving your plan.

Learn how SDBA works

How SDBA Works

SDBA OverviewWhat it is and how to tell if you qualify

Webinar Registration Confirmed

You're All Set for the May 14 Federal Benefits Webinar

Your seat is reserved. Add the event to your calendar below — and look for a confirmation email with your unique Zoom join link the day of the event. The replay will be sent within 48 hours after the live session.

Event Details

Date
Thursday, May 14, 2026
Time
6:00 PM – 8:00 PM Mountain
(8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT)
Platform
Zoom Webinars — works on phone, tablet, or desktop. No Zoom account required.
Instructor
Ann Werts — federal benefits specialist with 15+ years of experience.
Add to Calendar (.ics) Zoom join link emailed before the event

What Happens Next?

1

Confirmation email + calendar invite

You'll get an email confirmation in the next few minutes. Use the .ics download above to block your calendar now.

2

Reminders the week of the event

We'll send a reminder 3 days out, then a final note the morning of May 14 with your unique Zoom join link.

3

Replay within 48 hours

Whether or not you can attend live, we'll send the full webinar replay to your inbox within 48 hours.

4

Optional: book your Federal Retirement Money Map

If you'd like Ann's team to apply this to your specific FERS / TSP / FEHB / FEGLI numbers, book a complimentary 1:1 below.

Optional Next Step

Book Your Federal Retirement Money Map

30 minutes, complimentary, no obligation. We'll pull up your FERS pension, TSP, FEHB, and Social Security numbers and walk through the moves on a single page — your personal Federal Retirement Money Map.

Schedule My Money Map

Questions before the webinar? Email us at info@capitalwealth.com or call 801.210.2800

Monday – Friday, 9am – 5pm MT
